articles.title: Government holds firm on dropping Vat rate for hospitality as it plans further energy supports for winter
articles.excerpt: The Government is set on a planned Vat cut for hospitality, which will cost €680m, and is considering further energy supports for next winter.
articles.content:

articles.title: Taken note of introduction of bill related to H-1B, L-1 visa in US Senate: Govt
